description: Unified tabular-file ingestion — reads CSV / TSV / JSON / JSONL / Parquet / Excel into a pandas DataFrame. Three mutually-exclusive input modes: file_path (fixed local or fsspec URI), from_upstream (resolve from upstream asset's dict), or from_run_config (sensor-injected RunConfig with optional {partition_key} interpolation for dynamic-partition flows).

format.label: Format
format.description: File format: auto | csv | tsv | json | jsonl | parquet | excel. Default 'auto' inspects the URI extension.

file_path.label: File Path
file_path.description: Path or fsspec URI. Local (/tmp/x.csv) and remote (s3://, gs://, abfss://) both work. Mutually exclusive with from_upstream / from_run_config.

from_upstream.label: From Upstream
from_upstream.description: Resolve path(s) from an upstream asset's dict value. Shape: {asset: <key>, dict_key: "foo.csv"} | {asset: <key>, dict_keys: [...]} | {asset: <key>, dict_key_pattern: "*.csv", combine: concat|concat_with_source}

from_run_config.label: From Run Config
from_run_config.description: Resolve URI from sensor-injected RunConfig. Shape: {uri_template: "s3://{bucket}/{key}"}. The Config class is built from {field} placeholders. {partition_key} is sourced from context.partition_key (not RunConfig) — pair with partition_type: dynamic for dynamic-partition flows.

skip_rows.label: Skip Rows
skip_rows.description: Number of rows to skip at the start

header_row.label: Header Row
header_row.description: Row number to use as column names (0-indexed, None for no header)

columns_to_read.label: Columns To Read
columns_to_read.description: Comma-separated list of column names to read (empty = all)

parse_dates.label: Parse Dates
parse_dates.description: Comma-separated list of columns to parse as dates

cache_to_parquet.label: Cache To Parquet
cache_to_parquet.description: Cache the loaded data to a local parquet for faster re-reads

parquet_path.label: Parquet Path
parquet_path.description: Path for the parquet cache (auto-generated if empty)

include_preview_metadata.label: Include Preview Metadata
include_preview_metadata.description: Include a Markdown preview of the head of the DataFrame in materialization metadata

preview_rows.label: Preview Rows
preview_rows.description: Rows in the preview metadata when include_preview_metadata is true

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — list of team:name or email addresses

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds for the Dagster catalog. Auto-inferred from asset_name if unset.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag Minutes
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before the asset is considered stale

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy

partition_type.label: Partition Type
partition_type.description: daily | weekly | monthly | hourly | static | multi | dynamic | None

partition_start.label: Partition Start
partition_start.description: Partition start date (ISO) for time-based partitions

dynamic_partition_name.label: Dynamic Partition Name
dynamic_partition_name.description: Name for the DynamicPartitionsDefinition (when partition_type=dynamic). Must match the sensor's dynamic_partitions_name.
